name: proekt-doma
description: Web app for home design, planning and AI redesign

scripts.dev: pnpm build:contracts && concurrently -n contracts,api,web -c green,blue,magenta "pnpm --filter @app/contracts dev" "pnpm --filter @app/api dev" "pnpm --filter @app/web dev"
scripts.dev:api: pnpm build:contracts && concurrently -n contracts,api -c green,blue "pnpm --filter @app/contracts dev" "pnpm --filter @app/api dev"
scripts.dev:web: pnpm build:contracts && concurrently -n contracts,web -c green,magenta "pnpm --filter @app/contracts dev" "pnpm --filter @app/web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm build:contracts && pnpm --filter @app/api build && pnpm --filter @app/web build
